sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1=null
or d.CN=#companyId#
,'##',d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as text, case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select d.CN as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as companyName, case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) and d.extensionattribute2 = d.CN order by lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as user_name, CN as user_id, TITLE$lang$ as jikwi, MAIL as mail, DESCRIPTION$lang$ as dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
and $key$ = #value#
and $key$ like concat('%',#value#,'%')
and $key$ = #value#
order by lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME$lang$
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_project( tenant_id, project_name, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, status, progress, overview, weight_input, creator_id, creator_name, creator_name2, creator_deptname, creator_deptname2, workingday, rest_dueday, alam_mail_status, create_date ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectName#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #status#, #progress#, #overview#, #weightInput#, #creatorId#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorDeptname#, #creatorDeptname2#, #workingDay#, #restDueday#, #endAlamStatus#, #createDate# )
SELECT last_insert_id()
sqlMap.select:
SELECT GROUP_ID AS id, UPPER_GROUP_ID AS parent, GROUP_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, 0 AS TASK_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
AND ISSUEYN = 'N'
SELECT CONCAT('t',TASK_ID) AS id, GROUP_ID AS parent, TASK_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, TASK_ID FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, USER_POSITION$lang$ AS USER_POSITION, MEMBER_ROLE_ID, USER_ID_TYPE, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #roleId#
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND USER_ID_TYPE = 'user' UNION SELECT CN AS USER_ID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, TITLE AS USER_POSITION, C.MEMBER_ROLE_ID AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, C.USER_ID_TYPE AS USER_ID_TYPE, C.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT B.CN AS DEPARTMENT, A.MEMBER_ROLE_ID AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, A.USER_ID_TYPE AS USER_ID_TYPE, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',A.USER_ID,'%') AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.USER_ID_TYPE = 'dept' AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #roleId#
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND A.TENANT_ID = 1) C ON D.DEPARTMENT = C.DEPARTMENT WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT A.CN AS userId, A.DISPLAYNAME AS userName, A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, A.TITLE AS userPosition, A.TITLE2 AS userPosition2, B.DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT JOIN tbl_deptmaster B ON A.department = B.CN AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.CN = #userId#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN AS userId, DISPLAYNAME AS userName, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, " " AS userPosition, " " As userPosition2, DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_member ( tenant_id, project_id, member_role_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, user_position, user_position2, user_id_type ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #memberRoleId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #userPosition#, #userPosition2#, #userIdType# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT remainingWeight, plan_start_date AS projectStartDate, plan_end_date AS projectEndDate, weight_input AS weightInput FROM tbl_pms_project JOIN (SELECT 100 - sum(weight) AS remainingWeight FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE project_id = #project_id#) a WHERE project_id = #project_id#

SELECT p.setting_id as SETTING_ID, u.tenant_id as TENANT_ID, p.user_id as USER_ID, IFNULL(p.view_type,0) as VIEW_TYPE, IFNULL(p.progress_color,'##14C8FF') as PROGRESS_COLOR, IFNULL(p.complete_color,'##7AFF65') as COMPLETE_COLOR, IFNULL(p.overdue_color,'##FF4B14') as OVERDUE_COLOR, IFNULL(p.hold_color,'##FFF998') as HOLD_COLOR, IFNULL(p.project_sort,0) as PROJECT_SORT, IFNULL(p.list_number,10) as LIST_NUMBER, IFNULL(p.list_project_status, "P") as LIST_PROJECT_STATUS, u.mail as USER_MAIL, u.displayname as USER_NAME, u.displayname2 as USER_NAME2
FROM tbl_usermaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
FROM tbl_deptmaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
WHERE u.CN = #userId# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT A.PROJECT_ID AS PROJECT_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_NAME AS PROJECT_NAME, A.PLAN_START_DATE AS PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE AS PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE AS REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE AS REAL_END_DATE, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID AS HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.STATUS AS STATUS, A.PROGRESS AS PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW AS OVERVIEW, A.WEIGHT_INPUT AS WEIGHT_INPUT, A.CREATOR_ID AS CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.WORKINGDAY AS WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY AS REST_DUEDAY, A.ALAM_MAIL_STATUS AS ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, IFNULL(F.FAVORITE_ID, 0) AS ISFAVORITE, G.GROUP_ID FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON A.PROJECT_ID = G.PROJECT_ID AND G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = 0 AND ISSUEYN = 'N'
LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
WHERE
B.USER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%') AND
( B.USER_ID = #userId# OR B.USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.STATUS = #listProjectStatus#
AND A.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY $projectSort$
limit #startCount#, #listNumber#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_task( tenant_id, project_id, group_id, task_name, status, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, real_progress, weight, overview , member_count, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, writer_id, write_date, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, sort_order, workingday, tree_depth ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupId#, #taskName#, #status#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #realProgress#, #weight#, #overview#, #memberCount#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #writerId#, #writeDate#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptname#, #writerDeptname2#, #sortOrder#, #workingday#, #treeDepth# )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id

INSERT INTO tbl_pms_taskmember ( tenant_id, task_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, pctinput ) VALUES
( #[].tenantId#, #[].taskId#, #[].userId#, #[].userName#, #[].userName2#, #[].userDeptname#, #[].userDeptname2#, #[].pctinput# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET workingday = workingday + #workingday# WHERE project_id = #projectId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT workingday FROM tbl_pms_project WHERE project_id = #projectId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET workingday = #workingday#, weight = #weight# WHERE task_id = #taskId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.sort_order) + 1, 0) FROM (SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE group_id = #groupId# UNION SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_group WHERE upper_group_id = #groupId#) a

SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT A.project_id) FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_member M ON A.PROJECT_ID = M.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID
WHERE M.USER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%') AND
WHERE
( B.USER_ID = #userId# OR B.USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.STATUS = #status#
AND A.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_setting ( TENANT_ID, USER_ID, VIEW_TYPE, PROGRESS_COLOR, COMPLETE_COLOR, OVERDUE_COLOR, HOLD_COLOR, PROJECT_SORT, LIST_NUMBER, LIST_PROJECT_STATUS ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #userId#, #viewType#, #progressColor#, #completeColor#, #overdueColor#, #holdColor#, #projectSort#, #listNumber#, #listProjectStatus# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_setting SET VIEW_TYPE = #viewType#, PROGRESS_COLOR = #progressColor#, COMPLETE_COLOR = #completeColor#, OVERDUE_COLOR = #overdueColor#, HOLD_COLOR = #holdColor#, PROJECT_SORT = #projectSort#, LIST_NUMBER = #listNumber#
, LIST_PROJECT_STATUS = #listProjectStatus#
WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.PROJECT_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_NAME, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.STATUS, A.PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.WEIGHT_INPUT, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, A.ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, IFNULL(F.FAVORITE_ID, 0) AS ISFAVORITE, G.GROUP_ID FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member M ON A.PROJECT_ID = M.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON A.PROJECT_ID = G.PROJECT_ID AND G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = 0 AND ISSUEYN = 'N' WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND (M.USER_ID = #userId# OR M.USER_ID = #deptId# )

SELECT DISTINCT A.TASK_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_ID, A.TASK_NAME, A.STATUS, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.WEIGHT, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.WRITER_ID, A.WRITE_DATE, A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, A.WRITER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.WORKINGDAY, IFNULL(A.REST_DUEDAY, 0) AS REST_DUEDAY, IFNULL(A.LINK_TASK_ID, 0) AS LINK_TASK_ID, A.DEL_STATUS, D.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, B.PROJECT_NAME FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND C.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND E.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.STATUS LIKE CONCAT('%',#status#,'%')
AND A.TASK_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#taskName#,'%')
AND D.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#upperGroupName#,'%')
AND A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#headManagerName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searhByStartDate#
AND E.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByProjectName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
AND (A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY PLAN_END_DATE
ORDER BY( CASE A.STATUS WHEN 'P' THEN 1 WHEN 'W' THEN 2 WHEN 'L' THEN 3 WHEN 'S' THEN 4 WHEN 'C' THEN 5 END ), PLAN_START_DATE
LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#
SELECT MIN(MEMBER_ROLE_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER WHERE ( USER_ID = #userId# OR USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET STATUS = #status# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_favorite (TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, USER_ID) VALUES (#tenantId#, #projectId#, #userId#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_favorite WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROJECT_ID FROM tbl_pms_favorite WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TASK_MEMBER_ID, TENANT_ID, TASK_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, PCTINPUT FROM tbl_pms_taskmember WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_member WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM tbl_pms_taskmember WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET PROJECT_NAME = #projectName#, WEIGHT_INPUT = #weightInput#, PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, ALAM_MAIL_STATUS = #alamMailStatus#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, WORKINGDAY = #workingday#, REST_DUEDAY = #restDueday#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET
REAL_START_DATE = #changeDate#
REAL_END_DATE = #changeDate#, PROGRESS = #progress#, REST_DUEDAY = #restDueday#
WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT KANBAN_ORDER FROM TBL_PMS_MAINLIST WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_GROUP ( TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_NAME, UPPER_GROUP_ID, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, CREATE_DATE, CREATOR_NAME, CREATOR_NAME2, CREATOR_ID, CREATOR_DEPTNAME, CREATOR_DEPTNAME2, REAL_PROGRESS, OVERVIEW, MEMBER_COUNT, HEAD_MANAGER_ID, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2, TREE_DEPTH, ANCESTER_GROUP, SORT_ORDER, DEL_STATUS, WORKINGDAY, REST_DUEDAY, ISSUEYN ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupName#, #upperGroupId#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #createDate#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorId#, #creatorDeptname#, #creatorDeptname2#, #progress#, #overview#, #memberCount#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #treeDepth#, #ancestorGroup#, #sortOrder#, #delStatus#, #workingDay#, #restDueday#, #isIssue# )
SELECT last_insert_id()

INSERT INTO tbl_pms_item_list ( tenant_id, writer_id, title, write_overview, write_type, write_content, write_date, write_update_date, read_count, task_id, group_id, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, writer_position, writer_position2 ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #writerId#, #title#, #writeOverview#, #writeType#, #writeContent#, #writeDate#, #writeUpdateDate#, #readCount#, #taskId#, #groupId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #writerPosition#, #writerPosition2# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET title = #title#, write_overview = #writeOverview#, write_type = #writeType#, write_content = #writeContent#, write_update_date = #writeUpdateDate#, task_id = #taskId#, group_id = #groupId# WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET task_id = #taskId#, group_id = #groupId# WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET del_status = 1 WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT file_path, file_size, file_name FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT B.item_id, B.title, B.write_overview, B.write_type, B.write_date, B.write_update_date, B.read_count, B.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, B.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, T.task_name, G.group_name, IFNULL(F.file_cnt, 0) AS FILE_CNT, B.write_content, B.task_id, B.group_id FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_group G ON B.group_id = G.group_id LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_task T ON B.task_id = T.task_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT count(file_id) AS file_cnt, item_id FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment GROUP BY item_id) F ON B.item_id = F.item_id
WHERE G.project_id = #projectId#
WHERE (B.group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id IN (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where upper_group_id = #groupId#))
WHERE B.task_id = #taskId#
AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0 ORDER BY
CASE B.write_type WHEN 1 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 4 ELSE B.write_type END ASC,
B.item_id DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT COUNT(item_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_group G ON B.group_id = G.group_id
WHERE G.project_id = #projectId#
WHERE (B.group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id IN (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where upper_group_id = #groupId#))
WHERE B.task_id = #taskId#
AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0

SELECT B.item_id, B.writer_id, B.title, B.write_overview, B.write_type, B.write_content, B.write_date, B.write_update_date, B.read_count, B.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, B.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, B.writer_position$lang$ AS writer_position, T.task_name, G.group_name, M.mobile, B.group_id, B.task_id, P.project_id, P.project_name FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_group G ON B.group_id = G.group_id LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_task T ON B.task_id = T.task_id LEFT JOIN tbl_usermaster M on B.writer_id = M.cn and B.tenant_id = M.tenant_id JOIN tbl_pms_project P ON G.project_id = P.project_id WHERE B.item_id = #itemId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #itemId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_item_read ( tenant_id, project_id, item_id, read_date, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2 ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #itemId#, now(), #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptName#, #userDeptName2# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(read_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_read WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id != #userId#

SELECT R.read_date, R.user_name, R.user_deptname, U.title AS position, R.user_id FROM tbl_pms_item_read R JOIN tbl_usermaster U ON R.user_id = U.cn AND R.tenant_id = U.tenant_id WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND R.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id != #userId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_MAINLIST SET KANBAN_ORDER = #orderStatus# WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET GROUP_ID = #groupId#, TASK_NAME = #taskName#, STATUS = #status#, PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, REAL_PROGRESS = #realProgress#, WEIGHT = #weight#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, MEMBER_COUNT = #memberCount#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#, WRITER_ID = #writerId#, WRITE_DATE = #writeDate#, WRITER_NAME = #writerName#, WRITER_NAME2 = #writerName2#, WRITER_DEPTNAME = #writerDeptname#, WRITER_DEPTNAME2 = #writerDeptname2#, SORT_ORDER = #sortOrder#, WORKINGDAY = #workingday# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET STATUS = #status#, REAL_END_DATE = IFNULL(REAL_END_DATE, #realEndDate#), REAL_START_DATE = IFNULL(REAL_START_DATE, #realEndDate#), REAL_PROGRESS = #progress# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.GROUP_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_NAME, A.UPPER_GROUP_ID, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.DEL_STATUS, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, P.PROJECT_NAME, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M ON A.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND A.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByGroupName#, '%')
AND B.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUpperGroupName#, '%')
AND M.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUser#, '%')
AND P.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByProjectName#, '%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByOverview#, '%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searchByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
ORDER BY A.PLAN_END_DATE
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
limit #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT A.TASK_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_ID, A.TASK_NAME, A.STATUS, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.WEIGHT, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.WRITER_ID, A.WRITE_DATE, A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, A.WRITER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.WORKINGDAY, IFNULL(A.REST_DUEDAY, 0) AS REST_DUEDAY, IFNULL(A.LINK_TASK_ID, 0) AS LINK_TASK_ID, A.DEL_STATUS, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_group B ON A.GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE A.TASK_ID = #taskId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.TASK_ID) FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND C.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND E.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.STATUS = #status#
AND D.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#upperGroupName#,'%')
AND A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#headManagerName#,'%')
AND A.TASK_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#taskName#,'%')
AND E.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByProjectName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searhByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
AND (A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_LOG ( TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, TASK_ID, LOG_DATE, LOG_STATUS, USER_NAME, USER_NAME2, USER_DEPTNAME, USER_DEPTNAME2, LOG_CONTENT, USER_ID ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupId#, #taskId#, #logDate#, #logStatus#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #logContent#, #userId# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(L.LOG_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_LOG L JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON L.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON L.GROUP_ID = G.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK T ON L.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID
WHERE (L.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
WHERE L.task_id = #taskId#
AND L.LOG_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
AND L.LOG_STATUS = #searchByStatus#
AND L.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT L.LOG_ID AS LOG_ID, L.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, L.PROJECT_ID AS PROJECT_ID, L.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID, L.TASK_ID AS TASK_ID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(LOG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as LOG_DATE, L.LOG_STATUS AS LOG_STATUS, L.USER_ID AS USER_ID, L.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, L.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, L.LOG_CONTENT AS LOG_CONTENT, G.GROUP_NAME AS GROUP_NAME, T.TASK_NAME AS TASK_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_LOG L JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON L.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON L.GROUP_ID = G.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK T ON L.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID WHERE L.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND (L.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
AND L.task_id = #taskId#
AND L.LOG_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
AND L.LOG_STATUS = #searchByStatus#
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY LOG_ID DESC
limit #startCount#, #listNumber#
SELECT 1 FROM tbl_pms_item_read WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND user_id = #userId#

SELECT PROJECT_ID, TENANT_ID, PROJECT_NAME, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, REAL_START_DATE, REAL_END_DATE, HEAD_MANAGER_ID, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, STATUS, PROGRESS, OVERVIEW, WEIGHT_INPUT, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, WORKINGDAY, REST_DUEDAY, ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, 0 AS ISFAVORITE FROM TBL_PMS_PROJECT WHERE STATUS = #status#

select A.status, count(*) as count from tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_PMS_PROJECT B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.STATUS
SELECT TASK_MEMBER_ID FROM TBL_PMS_TASKMEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM TBL_PMS_ITEM_ATTACHMENT WHERE ITEM_ID = #itemId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET GROUP_ID = #groupId#, TASK_NAME = #taskName#, STATUS = #status#, WEIGHT = #weight#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, MEMBER_COUNT = #memberCount#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.GROUP_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M ON A.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByGroupName#, '%')
AND B.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUpperGroupName#, '%')
AND M.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUser#, '%')
AND P.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByProjectName#, '%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByOverview#, '%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searchByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET STATUS = #status#, PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#,
REAL_START_DATE = #realStartDate#,
REAL_END_DATE = #realEndDate#,
REAL_PROGRESS = #realProgress# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_groupmember( TENANT_ID, GROUP_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_NAME2, USER_DEPTNAME, USER_DEPTNAME2, MEMBER_ROLE_ID ) VALUES
( #[].tenantId#, #[].groupId#, #[].userId#, #[].userName#, #[].userName2#, #[].userDeptname#, #[].userDeptname2#, #[].memberRoleId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT MIN(MEMBER_ROLE_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
